title: Selective Test Execution — Happy Path: Only Affected Tests Run for Scoped Change
given: An engineer pushes a change that modifies 3 files in the payments service ('PaymentProcessor.java', 'PaymentProcessorTest.java', 'payment-config.yaml'), and the full test suite contains 2,400 tests across 12 services
when: CI determines which tests to run by analyzing the dependency graph of the 3 modified files
then: Only the 180 tests in the dependency graph of the modified files are executed (not the full 2,400-test suite), the CI run summary displays the selected test set with a breakdown showing '180 of 2,400 tests selected based on dependency analysis of 3 changed files', and the total wall-clock time is under 15 minutes
